        catch (global::System.Exception ex)
        {
            return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::CatDto, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Failure(new global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError("mapping.constructor.threw", "(root)", ex.Message));

        }
        if (src is global::Dog __1)
        {
            var __r1 = TryMap(__1);
            return __r1.IsSuccess
                ? global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::AnimalDto, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Success(__r1.Value)
